name: Applesauce Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 350°F. Sift together both flours and baking soda. In a bowl, stir in oat bran, rolled oats, cinnamon, and cloves. In another large bowl, mix brown sugar, oil, honey, egg white, and applesauce until combined. Stir in the flour mixture until well mixed. Fold in raisins (if using). Spray cookie sheets with vegetable cooking spray. Drop teaspoons of dough about 2 inches apart onto the sheets. Bake for 10-12 minutes. Remove from the cookie sheet immediately. Yield: 50 cookies.
NOTES: This spicy, soft cookie is filled with the good taste and nutrition of apples.
